title: NBS Extensions
description: A mod for importing Nbs files into Diamondfire.
body:
[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/HLPoNnY.png)](https://discord.gg/JrhbgMGTXw)

# Notice:
### This is my first mod. Do Not Expect Much.
As of now, the mod features are made to replace similar features in [Recode](https://modrinth.com/mod/recode) as it has been discontinued. I am willing to add non-Diamondfire related features to expand this mod's functionality. You can come suggest some in my Discord server, or contribute to the project through GitHub.

# Setup:

[!] This mod uses ```.nbs``` files obtained from [Noteblock World](https://noteblock.world/).
- Launch game with the mod.
- Place ```.nbs``` files in NBS songs folder. (```<Path to Profile>/NBSE/NBS Files/```)
- In Creative Mode, use ```/nbs gui``` to view songs.

# Features:

- ```/nbs load``` Imports songs using the format on [Recode](https://modrinth.com/mod/recode)
- ```/nbs load_custom``` Imports songs in a similar format, but the pitch values are raw ```key + fine pitch``` values multiplied by 1000
- ```/nbs gui``` Opens an experimental GUI for importing songs
- ```/nbs player``` Obtains a simple nbs player to play nbs songs

# Planned Features

- Gui shows more data about each song file
- Config Menu
- (Maybe) Client-Side player for previewing and reducing noteblock ping lag.

# You Can Help:

1. Clone the GitHub Repository.
2. Make changes to help improve the mod.
3. Create a Pull Request.

It has only been me and RedVortex working on this, but code suggestions can help further this mod. You can even add your own personal touches to existing parts. (e.g. UI adjustments.)
